title: [PROJ-SETUP-001] Init repo, structura de foldere si conventii Git
body:
Create GitHub repository.
Setup folder structure: /backend, /frontend, /docs.
Implement branching strategy: feature/*, fix/*, chore/*.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Repository is accessible to all 8 team members.
- .gitignore is configured for Java and Node.js.
- Pull Request template is added.

title: [BE-SETUP-001] Init proiect Spring Boot (structura pachete, profiluri dev/test/prod)
body:
Create Spring Boot application.
Configure profiles: application-dev.yml, application-prod.yml.
Implement layered packages: controller, service, repository, entity, dto.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Application starts successfully on local environment.
- Profile specific properties are correctly loaded.

title: [BE-SETUP-002] Conexiune PostgreSQL + migrari Flyway
body:
Create database connection config in application.yml.
Inject dependency: spring-boot-starter-data-jpa, flyway-core, postgresql.
Implement initial migration: V1__init_schema.sql.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Application connects successfully to PostgreSQL.
- Flyway executes V1 migration at startup.

title: [BE-SETUP-003] Gestionare globala erori si validare (Exception Handler + Bean Validation)
body:
Create GlobalExceptionHandler annotated with @ControllerAdvice.
Implement handlers for: EntityNotFoundException, MethodArgumentNotValidException, IllegalStateException.
Acceptance Criteria:
- API returns standardized JSON error response (timestamp, status, error, message).
- 400 Bad Request is returned for invalid DTOs.
- 404 Not Found is returned for missing entities.

title: [FE-SETUP-001] Init proiect React (Vite) + routing
body:
Create React Vite project.
Implement routing: react-router-dom setup with basic layouts.
Create structure: /pages, /components, /services, /hooks, /context.
Acceptance Criteria:
- React app runs locally.
- Basic routes (/, /login, /dashboard) are accessible.

title: [FE-SETUP-002] Client HTTP (Axios) + interceptori JWT
body:
Create Axios instance: apiClient.
Implement request interceptor: attach Authorization Bearer token.
Implement response interceptor: catch 401 Unauthorized for logout/refresh.
Acceptance Criteria:
- All API calls use the centralized apiClient.
- JWT token is automatically injected in headers if it exists in local storage/context.

title: [FE-SETUP-003] Design system de baza (tema, tipografie, componente reutilizabile)
body:
Create base UI components: Button, Input, Card, Modal.
Implement CSS variables/Tailwind config for colors and typography.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Reusable components are available and typed (if using TS).
- UI matches a clean, modern aesthetic suitable for medical software.
- Responsive design variables are set.

title: [FE-UX-002] Sistem de notificari UI non-blocante (toast-uri)
body:
Create ToastContext and ToastContainer.
Implement methods: + showSuccess(msg: string), + showError(msg: string).
Acceptance Criteria:
- Toasts appear without blocking UI interactions.
- Native alert() and confirm() are completely avoided.
- Toasts auto-dismiss after 3-5 seconds.

title: [DB-SCHEMA-001] Schema tabele Utilizatori & Roluri
body:
Create Flyway migration for Users and Roles.
Implement tables: users (id, username, password, role_id), roles (id, name).
Acceptance Criteria:
- Tables are created in PostgreSQL.
- Roles inserted by default: Administrator, Medic, Receptioner.
- Foreign key constraints are valid.

title: [DB-SCHEMA-002] Schema Medici, Cabinete, Echipamente
body:
Create Flyway migration for clinical resources.
Implement tables: doctors (specialty, schedule, standard_duration), rooms (name/number), equipment (name).
Acceptance Criteria:
- Tables are created with appropriate data types.
- Doctor schedule allows JSONB or relation for flexible weekly hours.

title: [DB-SCHEMA-003] Schema Servicii + relatie Servicii-Echipamente obligatorii
body:
Create Flyway migration for services.
Implement tables: services (name, price, duration), service_required_equipment (service_id, equipment_id).
Acceptance Criteria:
- Services table created.
- Many-to-many relationship mapping services to mandatory hardware is created.

title: [DB-SCHEMA-004] Schema Pacienti (GDPR-ready)
body:
Create Flyway migration for patients.
Implement table: patients (id, first_name, last_name, cnp, dob, email, phone, allergies, medical_history).
Acceptance Criteria:
- Patient table created.
- Sensitive columns (CNP) prepared for application-level encryption.

title: [DB-SCHEMA-005] Schema Programari (appointments) + stare
body:
Create Flyway migration for appointments.
Implement table: appointments (id, patient_id, doctor_id, room_id, service_id, start_time, end_time, status).
Acceptance Criteria:
- Appointments table created with FKs to all resources.
- Status column uses ENUM or VARCHAR for states (Scheduled, Confirmed, In Progress, Completed, No Show, Cancelled).

title: [DB-SCHEMA-006] Constrangeri DB anti-suprapunere (exclusion constraints)
body:
Create Flyway migration for EXCLUDE USING gist constraints.
Implement constraints preventing time-range overlaps for doctor_id, room_id, and equipment_id.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Database natively rejects inserts/updates if time ranges overlap for the same resource.
- btree_gist extension is enabled.

title: [DB-SCHEMA-007] Schema Fisa Consultatie
body:
Create Flyway migration for medical records.
Implement table: consultation_records (id, appointment_id, presentation_motive, anamnesis, clinical_exam, diagnosis, prescription).
Acceptance Criteria:
- 1-to-1 relationship with appointments is established.
- Columns support long text.

title: [DB-SCHEMA-008] Schema Audit Log
body:
Create Flyway migration for audit_log.
Implement table: audit_log (id, user_id, action, entity_name, entity_id, timestamp).
Acceptance Criteria:
- Append-only table is created.
- DB roles restricted so no UPDATE/DELETE can be performed on this table.

title: [DB-SCHEMA-009] Schema Notificari + coada retry
body:
Create Flyway migration for notifications.
Implement table: notifications (id, recipient, type, status, retry_count, payload).
Acceptance Criteria:
- Notifications queue table is created.
- Supports storing failed attempts for async retry.

title: [BE-AUTH-001] Autentificare JWT (login + refresh token)
body:
Create AuthService injecting UserRepository, PasswordEncoder, JwtUtil.
Implement retrieval: + authenticate(AuthRequest): AuthResponse
Implement logic: generate AccessToken & RefreshToken.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Valid credentials return 200 OK with JWT.
- Invalid credentials return 401 Unauthorized.
- Passwords are hashed with BCrypt.

title: [BE-AUTH-002] Configurare Spring Security + roluri de baza
body:
Create SecurityConfig.
Implement filter: JwtAuthenticationFilter.
Implement endpoint protection: @PreAuthorize rules based on Role.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Endpoints are protected by default.
- Authorities are successfully mapped from DB roles.

title: [BE-AUTH-003] Criptare parole si politica de parole
body:
Create PasswordValidator class.
Implement validation: check min length, uppercase, special char.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Account creation fails if password doesn't meet criteria.
- Stored passwords are never plain text.

title: [FE-AUTH-001] Ecran Login/Logout + rute protejate pe rol
body:
Create LoginPage component.
Implement PrivateRoute wrapper component.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Users can input credentials and receive token.
- Unauthorized users are redirected to /login.
- UI shows different menus based on User Role (Administrator/Medic/Receptioner).

title: [FE-AUTH-002] Context autentificare (auto-refresh token, logout la expirare)
body:
Create AuthContext.
Implement logic: intercept 401, call /api/auth/refresh, retry failed request.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Token refresh happens transparently.
- If refresh token expires, user is logged out and redirected to login.

title: [BE-RBAC-001] Restrictionare API fisa clinica pentru receptioner
body:
Create Method Security configs.
Implement annotation: @PreAuthorize("hasAnyRole('MEDIC', 'ADMIN')") on ConsultationService.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Receptioner role receives 403 Forbidden when calling GET/POST on clinical data.
- Medic can access the data.

title: [BE-RBAC-002] Restrictionare API rapoarte financiare pentru medic
body:
Create Method Security configs.
Implement annotation: @PreAuthorize("hasRole('ADMIN')") on ReportService for financial endpoints.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Medic role receives 403 Forbidden when calling GET on sales reports.
- Administrator can view financial reports.

title: [QA-RBAC-001] Teste automate pentru restrictiile de rol
body:
Create Integration Test suite (MockMvc).
Implement tests: verify 403 status for Receptioner on clinical API, verify 403 for Medic on financial API.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Tests run successfully and validate DoD #3.

title: [BE-RES-001] CRUD API Medici + orar saptamanal flexibil
body:
Create DoctorService and DoctorController.
Implement methods: getAll, getById, create, update, delete.
Acceptance Criteria:
- CRUD operations work correctly.
- Schedule is successfully saved and returned in DTO.

title: [BE-RES-002] CRUD API Cabinete
body:
Create RoomService and RoomController.
Implement methods: getAll, create, update, delete.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Room entities can be managed (name, number).

title: [BE-RES-003] CRUD API Echipamente medicale
body:
Create EquipmentService and EquipmentController.
Implement methods: getAll, create, update, delete.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Equipment entities can be managed.

title: [BE-RES-004] CRUD API Servicii + asociere echipamente obligatorii
body:
Create ClinicalServiceService and Controller.
Implement logic: save service details and associate required Equipment IDs.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Service is saved with correct price and default duration.
- Required equipment relations are saved.

title: [FE-RES-001] Ecran administrare Medici
body:
Create DoctorList and DoctorForm components.
Implement integration with Doctor API.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Users can view a table of doctors.
- Form allows setting weekly schedule matrix.

title: [FE-RES-002] Ecran administrare Cabinete
body:
Create RoomList and RoomForm components.
Implement integration with Room API.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Users can view and manage rooms.

title: [FE-RES-003] Ecran administrare Echipamente
body:
Create EquipmentList and EquipmentForm components.
Implement integration with Equipment API.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Users can view and manage equipment inventory.

title: [FE-RES-004] Ecran administrare Servicii + selector echipamente obligatorii
body:
Create ServiceList and ServiceForm components.
Implement multi-select dropdown for assigning required equipment.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Form correctly sends payload with service details and associated equipment IDs.

title: [BE-PAT-001] CRUD API Pacienti
body:
Create PatientService and PatientController.
Implement methods: search(keyword), create, update, getById.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Patient CRUD operations function properly.
- Search works by Name, Phone, or CNP.

title: [BE-PAT-002] Criptare CNP si date sensibile la nivel aplicatie
body:
Create AttributeConverter<String, String> for AES encryption.
Implement annotation @Convert(converter = AesEncryptor.class) on Patient.cnp.
Acceptance Criteria:
- CNP is stored encrypted in the DB.
- Application transparently decrypts it for authorized read responses.

title: [FE-PAT-001] Ecran lista pacienti + cautare/filtrare
body:
Create PatientList component.
Implement datatable with search bar and pagination.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Users can find patients quickly by typing in search bar.

title: [FE-PAT-002] Formular adaugare/editare pacient
body:
Create PatientForm component.
Implement validation (CNP format, email format, required fields).
Acceptance Criteria:
- Form allows rapid creation of a new patient.
- Proper validation errors are shown.

title: [BE-SCHED-001] Algoritm verificare disponibilitate - Medic
body:
Create AvailabilityValidatorService.
Implement logic: checkDoctor(doctorId, startTime, endTime).
Acceptance Criteria:
- Queries DB for existing appointments for doctor in the time interval.
- Returns conflict if overlap found.

title: [BE-SCHED-002] Algoritm verificare disponibilitate - Cabinet
body:
Create AvailabilityValidatorService.
Implement logic: checkRoom(roomId, startTime, endTime).
Acceptance Criteria:
- Queries DB for existing appointments for room in the time interval.
- Returns conflict if overlap found.

title: [BE-SCHED-003] Algoritm verificare disponibilitate - Echipament
body:
Create AvailabilityValidatorService.
Implement logic: checkEquipmentRequirements(serviceId, startTime, endTime).
Acceptance Criteria:
- Determines required equipment for service.
- Returns conflict if ANY required equipment is already booked in that interval.

title: [BE-SCHED-004] Endpoint combinat creare/editare programare + mesaj explicit de conflict
body:
Create AppointmentService and Controller.
Implement method: createAppointment(AppointmentRequest).
Implement orchestration of validators (Medic, Room, Equipment).
Acceptance Criteria:
- Fails with 409 Conflict if any resource overlaps.
- Conflict message explicitly identifies the blocking resource (e.g., 'Cabinetul 3 este ocupat').

title: [BE-SCHED-005] Gestionare concurenta la rezervare (tranzactii + locking)
body:
Refactor AppointmentService.
Implement @Transactional with specific Isolation Level or pessimistic locking (SELECT FOR UPDATE).
Acceptance Criteria:
- Concurrent requests for the same slot are queued/processed sequentially.
- Prevents race conditions from overriding availability checks.

title: [QA-CONC-001] Teste de concurenta (2 receptioneri, aceeasi resursa)
body:
Create concurrency test suite using ExecutorService or JMeter.
Implement test firing 2 simultaneous requests for the same doctor/time slot.
Acceptance Criteria:
- One request succeeds (201/200).
- The exact second request fails explicitly with 409 Conflict.

title: [FE-CAL-001] Componenta Calendar (vizualizare zi/saptamana)
body:
Create CalendarComponent integrating a library (e.g., react-big-calendar).
Implement views: Day, Week.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Calendar visually displays appointments.
- Time blocks are sized appropriately.

title: [FE-CAL-002] Filtrare calendar pe Medic / Cabinet
body:
Create CalendarFilter component.
Implement state lifting to refetch calendar events based on DoctorId or RoomId.
Acceptance Criteria:
- User can toggle view to see only Dr. X's schedule or Room Y's usage.

title: [FE-CAL-003] Creare programare prin click pe interval liber
body:
Implement onClick event on empty calendar slots.
Implement modal trigger: AppointmentFormModal prefilled with date/time.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Clicking a slot opens form.
- Creation flow is fast (under 2 windows, <30s).

title: [FE-CAL-004] Afisare eroare de coliziune in UI (non-blocanta)
body:
Implement error handling in AppointmentForm API call.
Implement toast trigger on 409 response.
Acceptance Criteria:
- UI shows clear message indicating which resource blocked the booking.
- Message is a non-blocking toast.

title: [BE-STATE-001] Enum si tranzitii valide pentru starea programarii
body:
Create AppointmentStatus ENUM (SCHEDULED, CONFIRMED, IN_PROGRESS, COMPLETED, NO_SHOW, CANCELLED).
Implement StateMachine map/logic defining allowed transitions[cite: 63, 64, 65, 66, 67, 68, 69, 70, 71, 72, 73, 74, 75, 76, 77, 78, 79, 80, 81, 82, 83, 84, 85, 86, 87, 88, 89, 90, 91, 92].
Acceptance Criteria:
- ENUM reflects the required business states.
- Transition rules are defined in code.

title: [BE-STATE-002] Validare si blocare tranzitii invalide (API + DB)
body:
Create AppointmentStateService.
Implement method: changeStatus(appointmentId, newStatus).
Acceptance Criteria:
- Transitions not following diagram (e.g., SCHEDULED to COMPLETED directly) throw InvalidStateException.
- API returns 400 Bad Request for invalid transitions.

title: [BE-STATE-003] Job automat marcare Neprezentat
body:
Create Scheduled task using @Scheduled.
Implement logic: find CONFIRMED appointments where end_time < now(), update status to NO_SHOW.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Job runs periodically (e.g., every 15 mins).
- Resources are automatically freed for no-shows.

title: [FE-STATE-001] Actiuni schimbare stare din calendar (drag-and-drop/meniu contextual)
body:
Implement context menu (right-click) on Calendar events.
Implement API calls to trigger state transitions.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Receptionist can quickly change state (e.g., to CONFIRMED or CANCELLED) directly from calendar UI.

title: [BE-CONS-001] API Fisa Consultatie (creare conditionata de starea In Progress)
body:
Create ConsultationRecordService and Controller.
Implement logic: Validate parent Appointment status == IN_PROGRESS before allowing save.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Cannot save medical record if appointment is not Active.
- Only the assigned doctor can edit it.

title: [BE-CONS-002] Regula de imutabilitate a fisei la Finalizat
body:
Modify ConsultationRecordService.
Implement logic: block UPDATE operations if Appointment status == COMPLETED.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Record becomes strictly read-only after finalization.
- API throws exception if modification is attempted.

title: [FE-CONS-001] Ecran Fisa Consultatie
body:
Create MedicalRecordForm component.
Implement fields: Motive, Anamnesis, Exam, Diagnosis, Prescription.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Form is editable if appointment is active.
- Form converts to read-only mode if appointment is completed.

title: [BE-SEC-001] Audit Log - interceptare acces/modificare date medicale
body:
Create AuditLoggingAspect using Spring AOP (@Aspect).
Implement Pointcuts on ConsultationController read/write methods.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Reading or writing medical records automatically inserts a row in audit_log.
- Log includes User ID, Timestamp, Action, Patient ID.

title: [BE-SEC-002] Protejare audit log impotriva modificarii
body:
Configure DB Roles and application privileges.
Implement restriction: App DB user has only INSERT/SELECT on audit_log.
Acceptance Criteria:
- No REST endpoint exists for DELETE/UPDATE on audit logs.
- Database natively prevents modifications.

title: [FE-SEC-001] Ecran vizualizare Audit Log (doar Administrator)
body:
Create AuditLogTable component.
Implement datatable with filters (User, Date).
Acceptance Criteria:
- View is accessible only by Administrator.
- Displays full history of medical data access.

title: [BE-NOTIF-001] Serviciu trimitere Email
body:
Create EmailNotificationProvider.
Implement integration: JavaMailSender or SendGrid API.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Can successfully send a formatted email template to a target address.

title: [BE-NOTIF-002] Serviciu trimitere SMS
body:
Create SmsNotificationProvider.
Implement integration: Twilio or similar API.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Can successfully dispatch SMS message to patient phone number.

title: [BE-NOTIF-003] Trimitere asincrona non-blocanta
body:
Create NotificationDispatcher service.
Implement @Async annotations and thread pool config for dispatcher methods.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Main UI request returns immediately.
- Notification dispatch runs on background thread.

title: [BE-NOTIF-004] Trigger notificare confirmare la creare programare
body:
Implement logic in AppointmentService.createAppointment.
Implement trigger: emit Event to NotificationDispatcher on success.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Patient receives email with Date/Time/Doctor/Room details automatically upon creation.

title: [BE-NOTIF-005] Job reminder 24h + link unic confirmare/anulare
body:
Create @Scheduled task for 24h reminders.
Implement logic: find appointments starting exactly in 24h, generate unique hash link, trigger dispatch.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Reminder is sent accurately 24h prior.
- Contains link for self-service confirm/cancel.

title: [BE-NOTIF-006] Trigger notificare instant la modificare/anulare de clinica
body:
Implement logic in AppointmentService.update/cancel.
Implement trigger: send instant update notification.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Patient is notified immediately if clinic reschedules/cancels the visit.

title: [BE-NOTIF-007] Mecanism retry pentru notificari esuate
body:
Create @Scheduled retry job.
Implement logic: select notifications where status='FAILED' and retry_count < MAX, attempt dispatch.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Transient failures (API down) don't lose messages.
- System retries automatically.

title: [FE-NOTIF-001] Pagina publica confirmare/anulare programare
body:
Create PublicActionPage component (outside PrivateRoute).
Implement logic: decode token from URL, show confirm/cancel buttons, hit API.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Patient can confirm or cancel without needing an account login.

title: [BE-REPORT-001] API Raport Rata Ocupare Resurse
body:
Create ReportService.
Implement calculation: scheduled hours / total working hours * 100.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Returns accurate percentage grouped by Doctor or Room for a given date range.

title: [BE-REPORT-002] API Raport No-Show
body:
Create ReportService method.
Implement logic: group by Patient/Time identifying highest NO_SHOW counts.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Returns list of top offenders or problematic timeframes.

title: [BE-REPORT-003] API Raport Vanzari
body:
Create ReportService method.
Implement logic: sum of Service Prices for COMPLETED appointments in range.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Returns gross revenue broken down by Service and Doctor.
- Endpoint strictly secured for Administrator.

title: [BE-REPORT-004] Export rapoarte PDF
body:
Create PdfExportService (using iText or Apache PDFBox).
Implement generation: convert report JSON/HTML to downloadable PDF.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Generates a visually structured PDF ready for printing.

title: [BE-REPORT-005] Export rapoarte Excel (.xlsx)
body:
Create ExcelExportService (using Apache POI).
Implement generation: write report data to .xlsx sheets.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Output is a valid Excel file.
- Numerical values are exported as Native Excel Numbers (not text strings).

title: [FE-REPORT-001] Ecran Rapoarte (selectie interval + tip + grafice)
body:
Create ReportDashboard component.
Implement charts integration (e.g., Chart.js / Recharts).
Acceptance Criteria:
- Administrator can select date ranges and report types.
- Data renders correctly in bar/line charts.

title: [FE-REPORT-002] Butoane export PDF/Excel din UI
body:
Add Export buttons to ReportDashboard.
Implement blob download handling from backend.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Clicking Export triggers file download successfully.

title: [BE-PERF-001] Sincronizare live calendar (WebSocket/STOMP sau SSE)
body:
Create WebSocketConfig / SSE endpoint.
Implement broadcast channel: publish appointment state changes.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Server pushes status updates to connected clients immediately upon DB change.

title: [FE-PERF-001] Integrare client WebSocket/SSE in Calendar
body:
Implement WebSocket client / EventSource in React.
Implement state update: merge incoming socket payload into calendar state.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Changes made by user A appear on user B's screen instantly without full reload.

title: [BE-PERF-002] Optimizare interogari (indecsi) pentru calendar si rapoarte
body:
Create Flyway migration for DB indices.
Implement indices on doctor_id, room_id, date.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Query execution plans show index usage for common calendar filters.

title: [FE-UX-001] Design responsive Desktop/Tableta pentru toate ecranele
body:
Implement responsive CSS media queries.
Test across standard Desktop and Tablet resolutions.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Interface looks good and functions well on Desktop.
- Interface is usable via touch on Tablets (for doctors in clinic).

title: [FE-UX-003] Optimizare flux adaugare pacient + programare
body:
Refactor booking flow UI.
Implement integrated modal preventing excessive window switching.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Creating a new patient and booking an appointment requires <= 2 successive windows.
- Can be done by a trained user in < 30s.

title: [QA-INT-001] Teste integrare algoritm coliziune (toate cele 3 resurse)
body:
Create specific test suite for collisions.
Implement scenarios: medic overlap, room overlap, equipment overlap.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Tests prove it's impossible to double-book any of the 3 resources.

title: [QA-INT-002] Teste integrare masina de stari
body:
Create API Integration Tests.
Implement tests trying invalid state jumps (e.g., Anulat -> Confirmat).
Acceptance Criteria:
- Verifies system strictly rejects invalid transitions at API level.

title: [QA-E2E-001] Test end-to-end flux complet
body:
Create E2E tests (Cypress/Selenium).
Implement full flow: Create Patient -> Book -> Confirm -> In Progress -> Complete Record.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Automated browser successfully runs through the happy path.
- Asserts that record is immutable at the end.

title: [DOC-API-001] Documentatie API (OpenAPI/Swagger)
body:
Inject springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui dependency.
Implement @Operation annotations on key controllers.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Swagger UI is accessible at /swagger-ui.html.
- Payloads and endpoints are documented.

title: [DOC-ARCH-001] Documentatie tehnica arhitectura & ghid deployment
body:
Create ARCHITECTURE.md.
Document system overview, scheduling algorithm, and build commands.
Acceptance Criteria:
- A new developer can read the doc and understand the core mechanics.

title: [DOC-USER-001] Manual utilizator (Administrator/Medic/Receptioner)
body:
Create User_Manual.pdf.
Document flows specific to Roles.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Covers resource management, scheduling, records, and reports.

title: [NTH-FE-001] Mod intunecat (Dark Mode)
body:
Create ThemeContext.
Implement CSS variable toggling (Light/Dark).
Acceptance Criteria:
- User can toggle theme.
- Preference is saved in localStorage.

title: [NTH-FE-002] Localizare multi-limba (RO/EN)
body:
Integrate react-i18next.
Implement translation JSONs (RO, EN).
Acceptance Criteria:
- App interface can switch between Romanian and English.

title: [NTH-BE-001] Sincronizare cu Google Calendar
body:
Create GoogleCalendarIntegrationService.
Implement OAuth2 flow and Calendar API pushes.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Doctor schedules are pushed to their personal G-Calendar.

title: [NTH-BE-002] Notificari push in browser
body:
Integrate Web Push protocol API in backend.
Implement service worker on frontend to catch pushes.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Receptionist receives browser push when a patient confirms via link.

title: [NTH-FE-003] Lista de asteptare (Waitlist)
body:
Create Waitlist entity and logic.
Implement UI to add patient to waitlist for a specific date.
Acceptance Criteria:
- System alerts receptionist if a slot frees up.

title: [NTH-BE-003] Auto-sugestie sloturi alternative la coliziune
body:
Modify AvailabilityValidatorService.
Implement logic to find next available slot if conflict occurs.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Instead of just 409 Conflict, returns suggested alternative times.

title: [NTH-FE-004] Dashboard analitic avansat (KPI-uri clinica)
body:
Create AdvancedDashboard view.
Implement complex trend charts (monthly revenue vs utilization).
Acceptance Criteria:
- Displays long-term trend data clearly.

title: [NTH-BE-004] Export CSV brut al rapoartelor
body:
Create CsvExportService.
Implement conversion of report data to comma-separated format.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Generates raw CSV for data processing tools.

title: [NTH-FE-005] Preferinte notificari per utilizator
body:
Add fields to Patient DB model (prefers_email, prefers_sms).
Implement logic in NotificationDispatcher to check prefs.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Patient only receives messages on preferred channels.

title: [NTH-BE-005] Rate limiting si protectie brute-force login
body:
Create RateLimitFilter (e.g. using Bucket4j).
Implement restriction on /api/auth/login.
Acceptance Criteria:
- IP is temporarily blocked after X failed login attempts.

title: [NTH-FE-006] Portal self-service pacient (auto-programare online)
body:
Create PublicBookingFlow UI.
Implement integration with scheduler API.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Patient can book themselves following strict availability rules.

title: [NTH-BE-006] Autentificare cu 2 factori (2FA) pentru Administrator
body:
Integrate TOTP (Time-Based One-Time Password).
Implement extra validation step at login for Admin role.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Admin cannot access system without code from Authenticator App.

title: [NTH-FE-007] Audit accesibilitate (WCAG AA) si remediere
body:
Run Lighthouse / Axe accessibility tools.
Implement fixes (contrast, aria-labels).
Acceptance Criteria:
- Passes WCAG AA automated checks.

title: [NTH-BE-007] Cache (Redis) pentru rapoarte frecvent accesate
body:
Inject Spring Cache and Redis integration.
Implement @Cacheable on heavy Report endpoints.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Reports return instantly from cache if data hasn't changed.

title: [NTH-BE-008] Istoric versiuni fisa medicala (inainte de finalizare)
body:
Create Entity Listener / Versioning table.
Implement tracking of draft changes to Consultation Record.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Admins can view previous versions of clinical notes before completion.

title: [NTH-FE-008] Mod tiparire optimizat pentru fisa de consultatie
body:
Create print.css layout.
Implement styling to hide navbars and optimize text for paper.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Ctrl+P on completed record yields clean, professional document.
